description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Select a monthly membership that includes both pool access and group classes, costs no more than $70 per month, set its start date to the first day of next month, and continue to the review step.

tasks.instruction: Book two beginner-level group classes next week between 6:00–9:00 AM and one beginner-level group class next week starting at or after 6:00 PM, all with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, then view your schedule.

tasks.instruction: Find a strength-focused personal trainer with a rating of at least 4.8 stars who offers a 5-session package costing under $300, select that package, and schedule the first session for the upcoming Saturday at 10:00 AM.

tasks.instruction: From the shop, add two blue water bottles and one towel to your cart, ensuring each item costs no more than $25, and choose in-club pickup at checkout.

tasks.instruction: For the current week, book four different group classes on Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday between 5:00–8:00 PM, making sure at least two of them are cardio classes, then open your schedule.

tasks.instruction: Reserve a squash court for next Wednesday from 7:00–8:00 PM, choosing the lowest-priced available court, and add a guest name to the reservation.

tasks.instruction: Submit a request for a 7-day free trial pass starting exactly 5 days from today, selecting weight loss as your primary goal and opting in to email updates.

tasks.instruction: Check the childcare hours for Saturday, then book the first Saturday group class that starts at least 30 minutes after childcare opens and ends by 12:00 PM, and view your schedule.

tasks.instruction: Enroll in a 6-week beginner running program that meets in the evenings after 6:00 PM and costs less than $200, choosing the first available start date next month.
